patch.value: Open Dependabot alerts on default branch after PR #246 merge: #39 (vite high: server.fs.deny bypass on Windows alternate paths), #40 (vite medium: launch-editor NTLMv2 hash disclosure via UNC path handling on Windows), #41 (@opentelemetry/core medium: unbounded memory allocation in W3C baggage propagation). Triage remediation path: determine direct vs transitive ownership, bump/override patched versions, verify via CI coverage+compat gates, and close alerts.
